SQL only. Idempotent CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for: lifere_agent_profiles(user_id bigint PRIMARY KEY, license_state text, experience_level text, goals jsonb default '[]'::jsonb, created_at timestamptz default now()); lifere_training_modules(id bigint PRIMARY KEY GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY, title text, category text, content jsonb, order_index int, created_at timestamptz default now()); lifere_roleplay_sessions(id bigint PRIMARY KEY GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY, agent_id bigint, scenario text, transcript jsonb, score jsonb, created_at timestamptz default now()); lifere_appointment_captures(id bigint PRIMARY KEY GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY, agent_id bigint, transcript text, extracted_commitments jsonb, extracted_criteria jsonb, created_at timestamptz default now()); lifere_commitment_queue(id bigint PRIMARY KEY GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY, agent_id bigint, promise_text text, due_at timestamptz, status text default 'pending', created_at timestamptz default now()); lifere_mls_search_queue(id bigint PRIMARY KEY GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY, agent_id bigint, criteria jsonb, status text default 'pending', created_at timestamptz default now()). No DROP. Use ON UPDATE trigger for updated_at where needed.

ESM. Export createLifereAgentAcademy({ pool }). Methods: createAgentProfile(userId, profile), getTrainingModule(moduleId), listTestTopics(filters), startRolePlay(agentId, scenario), submitRolePlayResponse(sessionId, response), scoreRolePlayResponse(sessionId), getNextLesson(agentId). Uses lifere_training_modules and lifere_roleplay_sessions tables. Parameterised SQL only. @ssot docs/products/lifere/PRODUCT_HOME.md.

ESM. Export createLifereAppointmentCopilot({ pool, emailQueue, mlsSearch, crmUpdater }). Methods: processAppointmentTranscript(agentId, transcript), extractCommitments(transcript), extractMlsCriteria(transcript), queueCrmUpdate(agentId, contact, notes), queueEmailDraft(agentId, recipient, subject, body), setupMlsSearch(agentId, criteria), getPendingActions(agentId). Detects promises like 'I will send you that email' or 'I will set up a search for 3 bed 2 bath in Summerlin'. Stores extracted actions in lifere_commitment_queue and lifere_mls_search_queue. Parameterised SQL only. @ssot docs/products/lifere/PRODUCT_HOME.md.

steps.task: Implement LifeRE real estate teleprompter engine
steps.spec: ESM. Export createLifereRealEstateTeleprompter({ pool }). Methods: loadScriptForScenario(agentId, scenario), getCurrentLine(sessionId), advanceScript(sessionId, clientCue), handleInterruption(sessionId, interruptionText), resumeAfterStory(sessionId), getTeleprompterState(sessionId). Stores sessions in a JSONB-friendly table (reuse lifere_roleplay_sessions with type='teleprompter' or a new teleprompter_sessions column). Contains real estate script library: buyer consultation, listing appointment, follow-up, objection handling. When the client tells a story or goes off-topic, pause and mark insertion point; when the story ends, resume with a smooth transition back into the script and closing process. Parameterised SQL only. @ssot docs/products/lifere/PRODUCT_HOME.md.

HTML/JS overlay UI for real-time script teleprompter. Shows current line, next line, pause/resume controls, and a panel that appears when the client goes off-topic with a smooth re-entry line. Communicates with /api/v1/lifere-agent-os/teleprompter endpoints. No server secrets. @ssot docs/products/lifere/PRODUCT_HOME.md.

ESM. Export async function registerLifereAgentOsRoutes(app, deps). Mount under /api/v1/lifere-agent-os: GET /training/modules, POST /training/roleplay, POST /training/roleplay/:id/response, GET /training/next-lesson, POST /appointment/process (body transcript), GET /appointment/pending-actions, POST /appointment/:id/approve-email, POST /appointment/:id/approve-mls-search, GET /teleprompter/state, POST /teleprompter/advance, POST /teleprompter/interrupt, POST /teleprompter/resume. Use deps.pool. Validate agent_id. Return JSON. @ssot docs/products/lifere/PRODUCT_HOME.md.
